name: conin-marketplace
description: Construction Intelligence (Conin) — turn raw, messy construction documents into rigorous, decision-grade deliverables across the project lifecycle.

plugins.name: conin
plugins.description: Conin — Construction Intelligence: feasibility studies, cost plans, payment certificates, variation accounts, claims registers, tender evaluations and more. One MCP + a served preprompt; deterministic-first, every figure graded SOURCED or ASSUMED.
